title: Yope raises $12.3M to build a private social network without algorithms or ads
summary: On Yope, users create their own profiles by sharing photos, which can be turned into cut-out stickers. Ismailu claims more than 50% of Yope’s users open the app at least five days per week, essentially making them power users.
